seo.title: Manufacturing — Joint Venture with Inoventive Filaments | Jal Agritech
seo.description: Jal Agritech's manufacturing arm operates as a Business Channel Partner with Inoventive Filaments Pvt Ltd, producing PET wire, agriculture nets, and shade nets at scale.
seo.keywords: manufacturing, inoventive filaments, PET wire, agriculture nets, shade nets, channel partner, jal agritech

cards.title: PET Wire Products
cards.description: Drawn and extruded PET wire — for filament weaving, agriculture nets, and industrial applications.

cards.title: Agriculture Nets
cards.description: Shade nets, insect-protection nets, and bird nets manufactured to greenhouse and field specs.

cards.title: Business Channel Partner
cards.description: Operating as a Business Channel Partner of Inoventive Filaments Pvt Ltd — joint capacity for large orders.

statistics.headline: Quality You Can Trace To The Loom.
statistics.description: Our manufacturing partnership with Inoventive Filaments gives complete control over raw materials, weave specs, and finishing — so every shipment matches the order exactly.

topics.title: PET Wire Products
intro: Our PET wire division produces drawn and extruded PET wire used as the base filament for agriculture nets, industrial netting, and specialty woven products. PET wire offers excellent UV resistance, dimensional stability, and tensile strength — making it the preferred filament for outdoor agricultural applications.

topics.title: Agriculture Nets
intro: Shade nets, insect-protection nets, and bird nets manufactured to greenhouse and open-field specifications. Mesh density, UV stabilization, and edge reinforcement are customized per crop and per project.

topics.title: Business Channel Partner — Inoventive Filaments Pvt Ltd
intro: Jal Agritech operates as a Business Channel Partner with Inoventive Filaments Pvt Ltd through a joint venture arrangement. This partnership pools manufacturing capacity, R&D, and distribution networks — giving Jal Agritech the scale to fulfill large industrial and agricultural orders while maintaining ISO-certified quality control across the supply chain.
